principle: Source-derived geometry is morphological scaffolding. Semantic paper positions are artistic territories, never claims of anatomical localization.

entries.name: Excitable neural gradient
entries.reason: A neural gradient is a mechanism, not an atlas-bearing organism.

entries.name: Adaptive mycelial graph
entries.reason: Fungi have distributed signalling but no canonical neural template.

entries.rawSource: whole-brain photograph and serial JPEG atlas plates; source imagery is not redistributed
entries.reconstruction: spinal-cord exclusion, whole-brain photo calibration, shared-scale serial contours, cerebellar folia oversampling, uniform final scaling

entries.name: NIMH Macaque Template v2 symmetric

entries.name: The learning machine
entries.reason: Artificial intelligence has no anatomical atlas; its visible body is a trained topology that evolves from perceptron to attention and mixture-of-experts.
